content.en:
Since the red mountain peak cracked a crack, the growth rate of the truncated area boundary has soared a lot, and a large number of resource treasure lands have been born, and one after another community boundary has been born.

A large number of ancient nests have emerged, and they have already reached the scale of the Hanhai District Boundary, and they are still changing.

For this situation, many Dao Ancestors were very confused, and they didn't know what was going on at all.

But Ye Tian vaguely knew some reasons.

"It should be the origin of the Hanhai District Boundary that brought more matter from the depths of the Truncated Black Mountain, and the cracking of the red mountain peak is one of the signs, and these materials have accelerated the transformation of the Truncated Area Boundary. I'm afraid it won't be long before the truncated region boundary is comparable to the Xuan-level regional boundary!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the days that followed, more and more Dao Ancestors came to the Truncation Zone boundary and settled here.

Anyone can see that the future of the truncated area boundary is not ordinary, so the first to come here and occupy a piece of territory can get more benefits!

Ye Tian did not participate in the resource competition to cut off the boundaries of the region.

For him, the current truncation boundary does not have many resources that will help him, unless the truncation boundary can grow to the level of the top Xuan-level regional boundary or prefecture-level regional boundary, then enough resources will be born that will help him a lot.

Now, Ye Tian still stayed in front of the cracks of the red peaks, using the red light of the soul splitting to temper his will.

But as time passed, the effect of the Soul Splitting Red Light was not very good, and Ye Tian had the idea of entering the Forbidden Zone through this gap.

"It's dangerous to cut off the forbidden area, if the Ninefold Ancestor enters it, he will die, and I'm afraid I will also die if I enter it. But if you don't give it a try, maybe you'll survive?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

"Just pass through this crack, this is also the easiest passage to enter the forbidden area!" Ye Tian decided.

Immediately, he walked towards the crack in the red peak.

If it was before, he wouldn't have been able to enter the red mountain peak at all, but with the red mountain peak having an additional crack, the prison in the dark was torn apart, and he could extend through this crack.

As he continued to advance, Ye Tian's body was suppressed by a force, his speed became slower and slower, and the pressure on his body became stronger and stronger.

Ultimately.

Ye Tian still passed through the crack and came to the cut-off forbidden area.

......

The area entered through the crack of the red peak is a patch of red, and the concentration of the red light of the soul is many times that of the outside world, and the special effect of cutting off the forbidden area is added.

Even if Ye Tian's will was very close to the immeasurable will, he still couldn't bear the Soul Splitting Red Light here.

Rumble!!!

The red light of Soul Splitting instantly submerged Ye Tian's will, and his entire body was shattered.

It can be said that with Ye Tian's strength, he was annihilated in just a moment when he entered the Interception Forbidden Zone, and it can be imagined how terrifying the danger here is!

"According to what the Nine-Story Building said, the area where the Soul Splitting Red Light is located is only the most ordinary area of the Forbidden Zone, and I can't even carry the most ordinary area, let alone explore and cut off the Forbidden Zone!"

At this moment, Ye Tian was truly aware of the horror of cutting off the forbidden area, no wonder even the Nine Primordial Ancestors didn't dare to come in and explore.

After the fall of this replica body, Ye Tian did not give up trying.

He had just made no preparations, and was annihilated in an instant.

"Next, the defense will be full, and then enter the cut-off zone to see!"

Immediately, Ye Tian stacked his defenses and entered the cut-off zone again.

As soon as he entered the cut-off forbidden area, Ye Tian shuttled quickly.

However, all kinds of defenses on his body kept crumbling, and one defense treasure after another came to naught.

In just a few breaths, Ye Tian's will was eroded, and his body began to collapse.

But just before Ye Tian's will was completely lost, his copying talent actually spied on a red creature, similar to a red beetle.

......

"The copy body has fallen!"

Ye Tian didn't have any loss, but was very happy.

So he found a creature that survived in the red light of Soul Breaker - Soul Breaker Red Beast!

The Soul Splitting Red Beast is a special creature, born in the Soul Splitting Red Light, and has a special Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowment - Soul Splitting Ancestral Endowment!

Ye Tian had already successfully copied this ancestral endowment, and quickly fused it and turned it into his own Yuan Dao ancestral endowment.

"I don't know if this Soul Splitting Ancestor Empowerment will allow me to resist the Soul Splitting Red Light for a while longer!" Ye Tian said darkly.

In fact, he wanted to copy a Soul Splitting Red Beast, but the Soul Splitting Red Beast he saw definitely possessed the cultivation of a half-step Ninefold Ancestor, so he couldn't copy it.

After possessing the Soul Splitting Ancestral Endowment, Ye Tian entered the Soul Splitting Red Light area and found that the erosion of the Soul Splitting Red Light on his will had been reduced a lot, but the refining effect had not been reduced.

"Sure enough, it can reduce erosion!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Immediately, he entered the cut-off box again.

......

Cut off the exclusion zone.

Ye Tian entered here again, and when he first came in, not only was the defense stacked here, but he also opened the Soul Splitting Ancestral Fu.

In a flash.

The Soul Splitting Ancestral Fu had an effect, and the Soul Splitting Red Light that had been so thick around him could not erode Ye Tian's will within a few breaths.

However, he wasn't a Soul Breaker Red Beast after all, so he still couldn't completely compete with the Soul Splitting Red Light.

As time passed, his will still crumbled, but at least he could hold on a little longer.

"If you have to find a Soul Splitting Red Beast from the early stage of the Eightfold Ancestor, it will be perfect!"

So, Ye Tian was working hard for this goal next.

But soon, he was unlucky enough to encounter a very terrifying Soul Splitting Red Beast, and was killed by the opponent's claw in seconds, and he didn't react himself.

Next, Ye Tian tried again and again, copying the body and falling again and again, but after dozens of attempts, he finally had good luck and sensed a slightly smaller Soul Splitting Red Beast.

This Soul Splitting Red Beast was only equivalent to the Soul Splitting Red Beast in the early stage of the Eightfold Ancestor, so Ye Tian could copy it.

"That's it, next you can copy the Soul Splitting Red Beast to enter the Interception Forbidden Zone, as the Soul Splitting Red Beast, those Soul Splitting Red Beasts shouldn't attack me, and I can stay in the Interception Forbidden Zone all the time!" Ye Tian muttered.

"Copy!"

Not long after, a Soul Splitting Red Beast was copied by Ye Tian, and then thrown into the red peak, heading towards the crack and entering the Forbidden Zone.

Soon, Ye Tian entered the Truncation Forbidden Zone as a Soul Splitting Red Beast.

"Although there is suppression, the red light of soul splitting does not erode me!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Although this can't activate the effect of tempering, he can explore this area, and that's the most important thing!

"It should be that the body of the Soul Splitting Red Beast is immune to the Soul Splitting Red Light, this Soul Splitting Red Light can't even erode the body, so naturally it can't erode into the inside of the will!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
